final:
module master_slave_d_latch (
    input wire D,
    input wire E,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);

reg obf_master;

always @(D or E) begin
    if (E) begin
        obf_master = D; // Capture D when E is high
    end
end

always @(obf_master or E) begin
    if (!E) begin
        Q = obf_master;  // Output Q follows obf_master when E is low
        Qn = ~obf_master; // Output Qn is the complement of obf_master
    end
end

endmodule
